name: Ability Score Improvement
effect: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 (max 20 each). Alternatively, take a Feat.

name: Extra Attack
effect: Attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action on your turn.

name: Weapon Mastery
effect: Use the mastery properties of 2 Simple or Martial weapons you're proficient with. Swap choices on Long Rest.

name: Rage
effect: Enter a rage: advantage on STR checks and saves, bonus damage on STR attacks, resistance to Bludgeoning/Piercing/Slashing damage. Lasts 1 minute.

name: Unarmored Defense
effect: Without armor, AC = 10 + DEX modifier + CON modifier.

name: Danger Sense
effect: Advantage on DEX saves against visible effects while not blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

name: Reckless Attack
effect: Before your first attack, choose to attack recklessly: advantage on STR-based attack rolls this turn, but attacks against you also have advantage until your next turn.

name: Primal Knowledge
effect: Gain proficiency in one skill from the Barbarian class list. You can use STR instead of a skill's normal ability when using a proficient skill.

name: Fast Movement
effect: Speed increases by 10 ft while not wearing Heavy armor.

name: Feral Instinct
effect: Advantage on Initiative rolls. If surprised, you can still act normally on your first turn if you enter a Rage before doing anything else.

name: Instinctive Pounce
effect: Move up to half your speed as part of the Bonus Action used to activate Rage.

name: Brutal Strike
effect: Forgo Reckless Attack advantage to apply a Brutal Strike effect on a hit: Forceful Blow (push 15 ft) or Hamstring Blow (speed halved until start of your next turn).

name: Relentless Rage
effect: When you drop to 0 HP while raging, make a DC 10 CON save to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each use; resets on Short or Long Rest.

name: Persistent Rage
effect: Your Rage ends only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it; it no longer ends from failing to attack or taking damage.

name: Improved Brutal Strike
effect: Improved Brutal Strike options available; can apply two Brutal Strike effects on the same hit.

name: Indomitable Might
effect: If your total for a STR check is less than your STR score, use your STR score for the total instead.

name: Primal Champion
effect: STR and CON each increase by 4 (can exceed 20).

name: Fighting Style
effect: Choose a Fighting Style feat as a bonus feat (Archery, Defense, Dueling, Great Weapon Fighting, Protection, Two-Weapon Fighting, Thrown Weapon Fighting, Unarmed Fighting, Blind Fighting, or Interception).

name: Second Wind
effect: Regain 1d10 + Fighter level HP.

name: Tactical Mind
effect: When you fail an ability check, spend a Superiority Die (no action) to add the die roll to the check, potentially turning failure into success.

name: Action Surge
effect: Take one additional action on your turn.

name: Tactical Shift
effect: When you activate Second Wind, choose a creature you can see within 5 ft; it can move up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.

name: Indomitable
effect: Reroll a failed saving throw, using the new roll.

name: Studied Attacks
effect: When you miss with a weapon attack, you have Advantage on your next weapon attack roll against that target this turn.

name: Master of Armaments
effect: When you finish a Long Rest, you can change any of your Weapon Masteries to another eligible mastery.

name: Alert
effect: Add Proficiency Bonus to Initiative. Allies you can't see don't impose Disadvantage on your attack rolls.

name: Crafter
effect: Tool Proficiency (3 of your choice). Nonmagical item purchases cost 20% less. During a Long Rest, craft a permanent Tiny item (Artisan's Tools required).

name: Healer
effect: Use Healer's Kit to stabilize a creature (Action). Spend a Healer's Kit use to restore 1d6 + 4 + MaxHitDice HP to a creature (once per Short/Long Rest per creature).

name: Lucky
effect: Gain 2 Luck Points. Spend to roll an extra d20 on an attack, ability check, or saving throw and choose which result to use. Also usable when you are attacked.

name: Magic Initiate (Cleric)
effect: Learn 2 Cleric cantrips and 1 Cleric 1st-level spell. Cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest without a slot; also castable with slots if available.

name: Magic Initiate (Druid)
effect: Learn 2 Druid cantrips and 1 Druid 1st-level spell. Cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest without a slot; also castable with slots if available.

name: Magic Initiate (Wizard)
effect: Learn 2 Wizard cantrips and 1 Wizard 1st-level spell. Cast the 1st-level spell once per Long Rest without a slot; also castable with slots if available.

name: Musician
effect: Proficiency with 3 Musical Instruments. After a Short or Long Rest, you and allies who hear you play gain Heroic Inspiration.

name: Savage Attacker
effect: Once per turn when you hit with a weapon, roll the damage dice twice and use either result.

name: Skilled
effect: Gain proficiency in any combination of 3 skills or tools of your choice.

name: Tavern Brawler
effect: Unarmed strikes deal 1d4 + STR damage. Proficiency with improvised weapons. After hitting with an unarmed strike or improvised weapon, attempt to Grapple as a Bonus Action.

name: Tough
effect: HP Maximum increases by twice your character level (retroactive). Gain 2 additional HP Max on every level-up thereafter.
